prompt: Weekly AI model pricing refresh. Run: python apps/model-pricing-dashboard/scrape_pricing.py (from the repo root /workspace/ninja). It scrapes the public aggregator aipricing.guru via Tavily and regenerates apps/model-pricing-dashboard/data/models.json with a fresh last_collected timestamp; the repo auto-commits the change. Then post a SHORT one-line summary to Slack (matched vs stale model counts + the new last_collected date). If the scraper reports 0 rows or errors, say so instead — do not overwrite data on failure (the script already aborts on 0 rows). Public sources only; no API keys.
